dimensions.name: Governance Awareness
dimensions.rationale: The agent maintained 100% compliance with defined schemas across all four reasoning spans. The explicit usage of the rules-context-loader and alignment-engine ensures that architectural constraints were actively loaded and validated against current work.

dimensions.name: Causal Reasoning Depth
dimensions.rationale: High-density context processing was observed in the evolution-map span (48,926 prompt tokens), indicating a significant synthesis of historical architectural state and current objectives. The sequential progression from mapping to intent generation demonstrates a clear causal chain.

dimensions.name: Architectural Tension Analysis
dimensions.rationale: The alignment-engine successfully reconciled architectural work against governance rules. The successful generation of intent following the evolution mapping indicates that the agent effectively surfaced and resolved potential tensions between immediate changes and long-term architectural health.
